metadata.title: Sabon Gari Local Government
metadata.description: Official website of Sabon Gari Local Government Area, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

slides.title: Sabon Gari – A Commercial Hub
slides.subtitle: Sabon Gari Local Government Area is an important commercial and residential center in Kaduna State.

slides.title: Sabon Gari – Gateway to Education and Trade
slides.subtitle: Its proximity to Ahmadu Bello University and Zaria makes Sabon Gari an active center of commerce and learning.

paragraphs: Sabon Gari Local Government Area is located in Kaduna State, Nigeria. The administrative headquarters is Sabon Gari town.
The LGA lies close to Zaria city and serves as a major residential and commercial area supporting trade and services in the region.
Economic activities include commerce, transportation, education services, and agriculture in surrounding rural communities.

chairman.name: Executive Chairman, Sabon Gari Local Government
messageParagraphs: Welcome to the official website of Sabon Gari Local Government Area. Our administration is committed to improving infrastructure, education, and economic opportunities for residents.
Sabon Gari serves as a key commercial and residential center supporting the broader Zaria metropolitan area.
Through responsible governance and collaboration with communities, we aim to build a modern and prosperous local government.

cards.title: Maize Farming
cards.subtitle: Staple Crop
cards.description: Maize is widely cultivated in rural communities surrounding Sabon Gari.

cards.title: Millet & Sorghum
cards.subtitle: Grain Crops
cards.description: Farmers grow millet and sorghum as major grains contributing to local food supply.

cards.title: Livestock Rearing
cards.subtitle: Animal Husbandry
cards.description: Livestock such as cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry are raised in rural areas within the LGA.

news.subtitle: Stay informed about development projects and community initiatives in Sabon Gari.

footer.headquarters: Headquarters: Local Government Secretariat, Sabon Gari, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

hero.title: About Sabon Gari
hero.subtitle: Discover the culture, economy, and development of Sabon Gari Local Government Area.

leadership: Executive Chairman: Sabon Gari Local Government
location: Neighboring LGAs: Zaria, Igabi, and Soba.
demographics: Major Ethnic Groups: Hausa, Fulani, and diverse Nigerian communities.
economy: Main Economic Activities: Commerce, transportation, education services, and agriculture.
Proximity to major institutions including Ahmadu Bello University.

geographyEconomy.title: Geography & Economy
geographyEconomy.location: Sabon Gari lies within the Zaria metropolitan area and acts as a residential and commercial hub.
geographyEconomy.climate: The LGA experiences a tropical savannah climate with rainy and dry seasons typical of northern Nigeria.
mainActivities: Commerce: Retail markets and trading activities.
Education Services: Proximity to Ahmadu Bello University and other institutions.
Agriculture: Farming of maize, millet, sorghum, and livestock rearing.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Reach out to Sabon Gari Local Government for inquiries and information.

contactDetails.text: Sabon Gari Local Government Secretariat, Sabon Gari, Kaduna State, Nigeria

contactPage.successMessage: Thank you for contacting Sabon Gari Local Government. We will get back to you soon.
